reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/ProtocolFeeProviderMock.t.sol test/TransferModesCombinations.t.sol src/SwapVM.sol && npx hardhat clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/ProtocolFeeProviderMock.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/TransferModesCombinations.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: src/Sw.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> src/SwapVM.sol && npx hardhat compile
